backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a `transform` query callback for HTTP outcalls and a `proxyUrl` shared function that acts as a generic HTTP GET proxy using the OutCall module.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (HomePage styling, home icon/nav drawer, default landing view integration) to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for both light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, border, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app with the title set to 'Study Tools', an educational meta description, and a `noindex, nofollow` robots directive.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders `BrowserLayout` alongside a dark-themed Sonner toast notification provider.
frontend/src/components/AddressBar.tsx: Smart address bar component that syncs to the active tab's URL, distinguishes search queries from URLs via icon and logic, and submits on Enter or arrow-button click with blur/reset handling.
frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.ts: Main browser chrome component orchestrating tabs, proxy/search navigation, games, and the HomePage default view, with integrated HomeIconButton and NavigationDrawer for global navigation.
frontend/src/components/CloakButton.tsx: Falcon cloak button with a dropdown mode selector (about:blank, https://error, 123456789101112) that triggers the `useCloaking` hook with the selected mode, styled in the Cheetah dark/orange theme.
frontend/src/components/ClockWidget.tsx: A compact clock widget component that displays the current time (HH:MM:SS) and date, updating every second via setInterval.
frontend/src/components/GamesPage.tsx: A page component displaying a grid of educational/fun game site cards (Math Playground, Hood Math, Unblocked Games) with thumbnails, tags, and click-to-navigate functionality.
frontend/src/components/HomeIconButton.t: A fixed-position home button component rendered in the bottom-left corner that triggers a navigation callback when clicked.
frontend/src/components/HomePage.tsx: The app's home/start page featuring a live 12-hour clock, large 'CHEETAH' branding, a tagline, and version/Discord info at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/NavigationDrawer: A slide-in left drawer providing navigation links to Home, Browser, Games, and Search pages, with a backdrop overlay and Escape key support.
frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx: Renders proxied web content inside an iframe, processing fetched HTML to rewrite relative URLs, strip CSP meta tags, and inject a navigation interceptor script that posts messages to the parent.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a list of Google Custom Search results with title, URL, and snippet for each item, supporting click-to-navigate and an empty-state view.
frontend/src/components/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal tab bar component that renders open browser tabs with active state styling, loading indicators, close buttons, and a new-tab button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Provides a `useActor` hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloaking.ts: Provides a `useCloaking` hook with a `cloak` function that opens the current page in a new popup window disguised as `about:blank`, an error URL, or a numeric string to hide the real address.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing a React context provider and `useInternetIdentity` hook for login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines `useProxyRequest` and `useSearchRequest` mutations that call the backend actor to proxy URLs and perform DuckDuckGo HTML searches, parsing results into a normalized format.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabManager.ts: Manages browser-tab state (add, close, switch, update) using React `useState`, exposing tabs array, active tab, and tab manipulation callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the Cheetah dark theme and homepage purple theme, and adds custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the Cheetah Browser web app project state, including existing features (custom homepage, home icon nav drawer, homepage routing integration) and a pending feature request for custom branding without 'vapor v4' references.
